cells.how: At the very top of Death Mountain, enter the Death Mountain Crater and you'll find a wooden crate. Roll into it to find a Gold Skulltula.

cells.cond: Learn Bolero of Fire and Prelude of Light, Bottle Bugs
cells.how: Once you have learned the Bolero of Fire, warp to the Death Mountain Crater as a child. Drop some bugs into the soft soil location to get the Skulltula to appear.

The wall that leads up to the large area at the entrance of Death Mountain Crater is climbable and it has an alcove with a Piece of Heart in it. There are two ways you can get it: 1) You can enter De…

cells.cond: Learn the Bolero of Fire, plant a Magic Bean
cells.how: As a child, warp to Death Mountain Crater and plant a Magic Bean in the soft soil next to the Triforce Pedestal. Warp back as an adult and ride the Magic Bean up to one of the two smoky mountains in…
